label: 扁平插画版
texture_guidance: flat vector、solid color blocks、极少纸纹、清晰图形边界。
scene_prompt: FLAT VECTOR ILLUSTRATION POSTER. light: no realistic light source, use simple flat highlights only; no cast shadows except tiny graphic offsets. material: solid color blocks, clean vector shapes, simple illustrated bowls, simplified storefront, rounded graphic icons; no photographic texture. color: cream #FFF4DE, coral #FF6B5F, leaf green #4CAF70, dark ink #253238; use solid color fills, no complex gradients. composition: Canva-like template clarity; title block takes upper 25-30%, illustrated food/store scene takes lower 50%, small decorative icons around edges only. avoid: no photography, no 3D render, no realistic steam, no heavy shadow, no oil-paint texture, no chaotic collage.
design_lessons: 扁平插画要用明确图形规则约束模型，否则容易退化成普通 3D 商业海报。
